headline.vsl_adaptation: What if you could detox your body every single day... without the headaches, fatigue, and suffering of a traditional cleanse?

lead.opening_verbatim: Each day, our liver is working hard to remove waste products and toxins from processed foods, unclean air, water and even our own body. But as we get exposed to increasingly more toxins, the liver struggles to remove them all and can start storing them in our body fat. We quickly may notice the results in our energy levels, in our lack of youthful appearance - and surprisingly, on our waistlines.
lead.hook_mechanism: Toxin overload explanation + unexpected weight connection
lead.transition_to_body: A detox, like a water or juice fast, is an excellent way to rid the body of stored toxins, but...

mechanism.mechanism_name: Daily Liver Support / Gentle Continuous Detox
mechanism.mechanism_description: Swedish formula with milk thistle, artichoke, and turmeric extracts supports liver function for continuous daily detoxification rather than periodic harsh cleanses. A healthy liver can properly burn fat and process toxins.

proof_elements.verbatim: milk thistle, artichoke and turmeric extracts

key_sections.content_summary: Liver overloaded with toxins, stores them in body fat, affects energy, appearance, and waistline

key_sections.content_verbatim: A detox, like a water or juice fast, is an excellent way to rid the body of stored toxins, but it is often difficult to abide by, and involves days or even weeks of feeling tired and sick.

Active Liver is a dietary supplement that helps promote a healthy liver and helps you detox on a daily basis - all year round. With just one tablet a day, it gently but effectively uses known herbal extracts to facilitate detoxing of the body - without the 'side effects'.
